title: Crafted Kindness
excerpt: When Jennifer McGuire and Kristina Werner reached out to me about participating in their latest collaboration, Crafted Kindness , I didn't even have to finish the e-mail before I said yes. Got to work with some of my favorite supplies,…
body: When Jennifer McGuire and Kristina Werner reached out to me about participating in their latest collaboration, Crafted Kindness, I didn't even have to finish the e-mail before I said yes. Got to work with some of my favorite supplies, including one of my favorite stamp sets. I love everything that these ladies do and I am especially proud to be a part of Crafted Kindness, an online card class series that's only $25 that will directly benefit hurricane relief. Crafting and charitable causes...who could say no to that?
